Data Quality Notes

Recipient EIN coverage: 56.1% of fact_grants have recipient_ein populated. Filter 3 (PF-to-PF) depends on this join, so some foundations may have PF-to-PF grants that we cannot detect because the recipient EIN was not recorded. Near-miss foundations that failed only Filter 3 are worth manual checking.

CA geography: Foundations headquartered in CA are included even without explicit CA grants in the database. Some national funders give in CA but have grants recorded without state info.

Veteran keywords: Regex search covers: veteran, military, armed forces, service member, wounded warrior, adaptive sailing, therapeutic sailing, adaptive recreation. Some relevant grants may use different terminology.
